title: oxymitra discostigma
intro: Oxymitra discostigma is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the custard apple family. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxymitra discostigma include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Oxymitra discostigma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
